Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Apex Life Sciences, Llc To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories Set One Nos. 1 Through 4 And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Areen Babajanian, Esq. of Justice Law Corporation, Tel: 818.230.7502, for plaintiff and moving party, on Court Call;
Wendy Sugg, Esq. of Sugg & Paracuellos, LLP, Tel: 949.260.9548, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The Court allowed defendant's counsel to argue the tentative ruling. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF BRITTNEE LOFTON'S Motion To Compel Defendant Apex Life Sciences, LLC To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories Set One Nos. 1 Through 4 And Request For Monetary Sanctions, as follows:

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to special interrogatory nos. 1-4 is granted, and Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
